title: tilia japonica
intro: Tilia japonica, also known as the Japanese linden tree, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. The bark and flowers of the Tilia japonica plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tilia japonica include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting sleep, and alleviating symptoms of colds and fever. Tilia japonica is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
